sources.title: MTC route information

license.warning: MTC does not publish an explicit open-data license on the route directory. Store derived route facts with attribution; do not redistribute page assets.

limitations: Ordered stage names only: no coordinates, route shapes, trip calendars, or departure times.
Stage spelling variants are normalized conservatively and may still represent duplicate physical stops.

sources.title: MTC static GTFS

license.warning: The portal advertises downloadable data, but a machine-readable license or terms file has not yet been captured. Do not assume redistribution rights.

sources.retrievalNote: On 2026-07-16 the official host returned DNS NXDOMAIN. Replace the MTC HTML fallback with this feed when a verified official download becomes reachable.

sources.title: CMRL static GTFS

license.warning: The portal advertises downloadable data, but a machine-readable license or terms file has not yet been captured. Do not assume redistribution rights.

sources.retrievalNote: On 2026-07-16 the official host returned DNS NXDOMAIN. The importer performs runtime link discovery and supports an explicitly verified official URL.

license.warning: No explicit open-data license was found. Store derived facts with attribution; do not redistribute page assets.

sources.useConstraint: Attribute OpenStreetMap contributors and preserve ODbL requirements for derived databases.
